title: Fluorescence Microscope Operation Procedure
author: 宏亮 董
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.7cmhiu6

steps.title: Add 15ul Bacterial solution to microslide at the clean workbench
steps.instruction: Add 15ul Bacterial solution to microslide at the clean workbench.

steps.title: Turn off the light in the...
steps.instruction: Turn off the light in the room and turn on the microscope mercury lamp.

steps.title: Select the appropriate filter according to...
steps.instruction: Select the appropriate filter according to the luciferin labeled with the sample.

steps.title: Place the sample and find the right view
steps.instruction: Place the sample and find the right view. If you want to take a picture, please make sure that the camera is loaded with color film.

steps.title: Turn on the selfie device and...
steps.instruction: Turn on the selfie device and select the manual file, usually within 0.5 to 10 seconds.

steps.title: End of use, turn off all power and record use
steps.instruction: End of use, turn off all power and record use.
